notes: Official ChatGPT full-context baseline capture for TreasuryBench V1.
response:
Based on the May 2026 transactions provided, these appear to be recurring monthly charges worth reviewing. I've separated true subscriptions from larger recurring bills.

Subscriptions / memberships
- Disney Plus: $15.99/month
- Spotify Family: $19.99/month
- Peloton: $44.00/month

Total subscriptions: $79.98/month (about $960/year)

Recurring household bills
- Bright Horizons Daycare: $1,650.00/month
- Rocket Mortgage (PITI): $3,850.00/month
- Xcel Energy: $164.22/month
- Xfinity Internet: $119.00/month
- State Farm Auto Insurance: $218.00/month
- State Farm Home Insurance: $154.00/month
- Toyota Financial auto loan: $485.00/month

Recurring savings contributions
- Colorado 529 CollegeInvest: $300.00/month
- HealthEquity HSA contribution: $400.00/month

Items that may be recurring but need confirmation
- Care.com Backup Care: $220.00 in May. The note says it was one day of backup childcare, so I would not assume this is monthly.
- Kaiser Permanente medical expense: $185.40 in May paid from the HSA. This looks like a healthcare claim rather than a recurring bill.

Highest-value review opportunities
1. Xfinity Internet: $119/month is often a bill that can be reduced through retention offers, promotional plans, or competitive fiber/cable options in Denver.
2. Insurance premiums:
   - Auto: $218/month
   - Home: $154/month
   Combined: $372/month
   Shopping bundled coverage periodically can sometimes save hundreds per year.
3. Subscriptions:
   - Disney+, Spotify Family, and Peloton total about $80/month.
   - If any are underused, canceling one service saves $192–$528 per year depending on which one.

One additional observation: childcare is your largest non-housing recurring expense at $1,650/month. Given Priya has access to a dependent care FSA through Salesforce, it may be worth confirming you're using it. The maximum annual contribution can reduce taxes on up to $5,000 of eligible childcare expenses, which can be worth roughly $1,000–$2,000+ per year depending on your tax situation.
